name: memory
description: Persistent text memory: save and search snippets via tool calls (workspace/Memory/memories.json).
prompt:
Memory tools (ModularClaw)

To store a note for later, include JSON like:
{"type": "tool_call", "name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "text to remember", "tags": ["optional"], "importance": 3, "metadata": {}}}

To retrieve notes, include:
{"type": "tool_call", "name": "search_memory", "arguments": {"query": "substring", "tags": ["filter"], "max_results": 10}}

Rules:
- save_memory requires "content" (string).
- search_memory: omit both query and tags to get the most recent entries (up to max_results).
- Send one tool JSON object per call; wait for the tool_result before assuming it ran.

supported_tools.name: save_memory
supported_tools.description: Save a text memory with optional tags and importance (1–5)

supported_tools.name: search_memory
supported_tools.description: Search memories by query substring and/or tags, or list recent
